title: Rotated Sorted Array Search
hints: Use binary search to find the target in O(log N) time.
Determine which half of the array is sorted by comparing A[mid] with A[0].
If A[mid] >= A[0], the left half is sorted. Check if target is in the sorted left half.
If A[mid] < A[0], the right half is sorted. Check if target is in the sorted right half.
If target is in the sorted half, search there. Otherwise, search in the other half.
Return -1 if target is not found after the binary search completes.
